task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the ActivInspire application interface (by Promethean) open on the screen, showing a flipchart canvas and toolbars.

task_completion.description: Page 1 contains 'Do Now' title and 'American Revolution' prompt
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a flipchart page titled 'Do Now' that contains a text prompt asking about student knowledge, which explicitly includes the phrase 'American Revolution'.

task_completion.description: Page 2 contains 'Learning Objectives' title and at least two goals
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a flipchart page titled 'Learning Objectives' or 'Objectives' that contains a list of at least two distinct educational goals.

task_completion.description: Page 3 contains 'Vocabulary' title and four colored rectangles with specific terms
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a flipchart page titled 'Vocabulary' or 'Key Vocabulary' that includes four distinct colored rectangle shapes. Inside or associated with these rectangles should be the words: Revolution, Colony, Independence, and Patriot.

task_completion.description: Flipchart is saved with the correct filename and path
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the ActivInspire window title bar showing 'american_revolution_opener.flipchart' or a save dialog/file explorer confirming the file is saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the ActivInspire GUI to create the flipchart
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the flipchart was created using the ActivInspire graphical interface, rather than being generated via terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent used actual shape tools for the rectangles
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the colored rectangles on Page 3 are actual shape objects drawn in the software, not just text highlighting, background colors, or ASCII art.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the correct application
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent did not just type the content into a text editor, word processor, or mock application instead of the actual ActivInspire software.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a 3-page flipchart in ActivInspire. Page 1 must have a 'Do Now' title and a prompt containing 'American Revolution'. Page 2 must have a 'Learning Objectives' or 'Objectives' title and at least two goals. Page 3 must have a 'Vocabulary' or 'Key Vocabulary' title and exactly four colored rectangle boxes containing the terms: Revolution, Colony, Independence, and Patriot. The file must be saved as 'american_revolution_opener.flipchart' in '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts'.
